segments.text: focus on taking step one then step two then step three there was a boy and a horse walking in dark dark woods the boy and the horse stops and the horse asks
what happened why are you stopping why don't we keep going ahead the boy says it's completely pitch dark I cannot see anything in front of me now the horse
asks the boy can you see your next step and the boy looks down and he goes yes I can the horse says then that's what you
do you take the next step the boy takes the next step and now the horse asks the boy again now can you see your next step
and the boy says yes I can and this is the same concept that you need to apply when you are procrastinating out of fear
I don't know what I'm going to do when step 10 comes but what I can do right now is focus on taking my next step
